overall.description: First-person walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city environment (Cyberpunk 2077) beneath elevated highways and past industrial buildings. The scene features bright morning sunlight casting long shadows, with light pedestrian and vehicle traffic moving through the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: emerging from deep shadow under overpass into brighter sunlit area ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the massive concrete highway structure, approaching the light

notable_agents.action: man in tank top walking toward camera on the sidewalk
futuristic green car driving on the road to the right

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass dominating the upper frame with metal support beams
tall industrial building with green neon signage and steam vents emitting white smoke
rusted metal barrier separating pedestrian walkway from the road below
industrial pipe emitting white steam against the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in a covered urban walkway. The industrial cyberpunk building with green signage and steam vents dominates the right side, while metal guardrails line the walkway. The lighting transitions from shadow to bright sunlight ahead as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban sidewalk with construction barriers and digital billboard

events.description: exiting covered overpass area into open sunlit street with clear sky visible
passing by pedestrians walking in opposite direction along the barrier

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk, passing construction barriers and approaching a large digital billboard ahead

notable_agents.action: construction worker in orange vest walking along the red and white barrier
woman with pink hair and white jacket walking past the camera

entered.detail: large square digital screen displaying colorful pixelated patterns and abstract graphics
tall yellow construction crane visible against the blue sky
tall palm tree near the construction site area
red and white striped construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Having emerged from under the overpass, the scene opens into a bright sunlit urban street. A large digital billboard displaying colorful pixelated graphics becomes visible ahead, while construction cranes and palm trees line the left side. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the construction-barrier-lined sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath highway overpass with digital displays

events.description: entering covered area beneath the highway overpass with reduced lighting
passing under the overpass deck into shadow as the billboard passes on the left

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass, passing the large digital billboard on the left side while approaching an enclosed pedestrian bridge

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: yellow metal scaffolding structure with safety netting
enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway beneath the highway overpass, passing the digital billboard now on the left. Yellow construction scaffolding appears on the left while an enclosed pedestrian walkway bridge becomes visible ahead. The lighting shifts to mixed shadow as the camera moves deeper under the concrete structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with elevated highway ramps and mountain views

events.description: exiting covered walkway and entering open intersection with visible traffic
crossing the street intersection, navigating around parked red van and moving traffic

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, navigating around parked vehicles and observing the traffic flow

notable_agents.action: red delivery van parked at the intersection corner
black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall traffic signal mounted on black and yellow striped pole
hazy mountain range visible in the far distance beyond the city
smoke rising from industrial facility in the distance
curved highway ramp ascending into the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area into a wide open intersection, the camera crosses the street among moderate traffic. A red van is parked on the right while vehicles pass through the intersection. Distant mountains and industrial smoke stacks become visible on the horizon, with highway ramps curving away on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway corridor with futuristic architecture and distant mountains

events.description: continuing straight along the wide sidewalk between parallel highway structures

agents.ego_description: walking along the open corridor between elevated highways, approaching a futuristic white building structure in the distance

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the futuristic structure

entered.detail: white angular futuristic building structure with archway entrance
tall modern street light with orange fixture and solar panel
patch of dry grass and dirt terrain beside the highway structure

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open corridor between parallel elevated highways, the camera approaches a distinctive white futuristic building with angular architecture. Modern street lamps line the left side while dry grass grows beside the highway on the right. The distant mountains shift to the left as the camera advances toward the futuristic structure ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a cyberpunk cityscape, transitioning from the shadows of massive overpasses into wide, sun-drenched urban intersections. It begins beneath a heavy highway overpass beside an industrial building with green signage and steam vents, moving forward as the lighting shifts from deep shadow into bright morning sunlight. As the camera emerges into the open street, the view expands to reveal colorful digital billboards, palm trees, and pedestrians navigating construction-lined sidewalks before dipping back into the mixed light of another covered walkway and pedestrian bridge. The scene then opens into a wide intersection filled with moderate traffic and a parked red van, offering a distant glimpse of mountains and industrial smoke stacks on the horizon. Finally, the camera advances along an open corridor between parallel highways, passing modern street lamps and dry grass as it approaches a white, angular futuristic building.
